title: Deliciously Dense Irish Lamb Stew
description: A savory and velvety Irish dish featuring ginger cordial, with a crowd-pleasing al-dente finish and high protein content, this stew is sure to satisfy any appetite
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat
Add the lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes
Add the onion, carrots, and potatoes, and cook until the vegetables are lightly browned, about 5 minutes
Add the ginger cordial, beef broth, tomato paste, thyme, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours
Remove the thyme sprigs and serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired
Let the stew rest for 10 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together
Serve with crusty bread or over mashed potatoes for a hearty and satisfying meal
